snapshot.title: Write science-value framing for each mission type
snapshot.description: Define, in a simple repeated format, what real dataset the player is seeing, what action they take, what structured output Saily captures, what real scientific value that output has, and how that output becomes in-universe Star Sailors narrative material. Covers Planet/TESS, Asteroid, Mars, and InSight. Inspired by the Planet Hunters framing used in product discussions.

acceptanceCriteria.text: Spec covers all current mission types in a consistent format
Each mission type has dataset, player action, scientific output/benefit, and narrative output sections
Language is plain enough to reuse in onboarding, home hub, and puzzle helper copy
